context: Tests whether the agent builds custom AVKit PiP around AVPictureInPictureController and user-initiated controls.

checklist.name: Uses PiP controller
checklist.description: Uses AVPictureInPictureController with AVPlayerLayer or a content source rather than subclassing AVPlayerViewController.

checklist.name: Device support
checklist.description: Checks AVPictureInPictureController.isPictureInPictureSupported before exposing or configuring PiP UI.

checklist.name: Current possibility
checklist.description: Checks or observes isPictureInPicturePossible before enabling or starting PiP.

checklist.name: User interaction
checklist.description: Starts custom PiP only from an explicit user interaction such as a PiP button action.

checklist.name: Restore delegate
checklist.description: Implements restoreUserInterfaceForPictureInPictureStopWithCompletionHandler and calls the completion handler.

checklist.name: Playback setup
checklist.description: Includes playback audio session and Audio/AirPlay/PiP background mode prerequisites.
